markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review weekly progress on SEO, content, and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Tech Audit Blocked:** Fran is unresponsive on two critical tasks (deleting suffix pages, fixing broken links), stalling the technical audit.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [**Content Pace Adjusted:** Weekly blog refreshes are reduced from 10 to 6. This is a temporary measure to accommodate the heavier lift of rewriting old posts from scratch to feature Datagrid's product.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [**Performance Improving:** November's traffic dip was a data artifact from a Google Tag issue, now fixed. Clicks are up, indicating higher-quality traffic despite lower impressions.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Programmatic Pages on Track:** Fran delivered the page templates. GrowthX will review them to build a pipeline for an early January launch.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

## Topics

### Technical Audit Blocked

  - [The technical audit is stalled pending two unresolved tasks from Fran:](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**Page Deletion:** Remove pages with URL suffixes.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [**Broken Links:** Fix all links from a provided list.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [**Issue:** Fran is mixing up message contexts, responding with programmatic page templates instead of addressing these specific tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [**Impact:** The audit cannot be finalized until these items are completed.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Content & Editorial

  - [**Arculate Tasks:**](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [Blog title formatting → **Done**.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [Static page metadata updates (e.g., Product, Contact Us) → **Due Monday**.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Newsletter:**](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [Staged in HubSpot; Kaitlin made minor edits (spacing, dates).](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [**Send Date:** Next Monday or Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [**Future Process:** GrowthX will handle scheduling/sending once Kaitlin confirms the final contact list.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [**Blog Refresh Pace:**](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [**Change:** Weekly refreshes reduced from 10 to 6.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The work is a heavier lift than standard refreshes, as it involves rewriting old posts from scratch to better feature Datagrid's product.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [**Programmatic Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [Fran delivered the page templates.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [GrowthX is reviewing them to clarify requirements and will then build the pipeline for an early January launch.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Performance & Analytics

  - [**November Traffic Dip:**](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
      - [**Cause:** A Google Tag issue, now fixed.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
      - [**Impact:** Skewed non-branded impression data.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Current Trends:**](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
      - [**Clicks:** Increased, indicating higher-quality traffic (more clicks per impression).](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Impressions:** Decreased, likely due to Google's bot traffic filtering.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Weekly Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
      - [All cohorts saw an expected post-Thanksgiving jump.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [New articles are showing good traction.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
      - [LLM traffic is off to a strong start.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

      - [Review programmatic page templates and clarify requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Kaitlin:**](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [Send the newsletter next Monday or Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [Inform the WonderUp team about the tech audit blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/9HcAtJqmVxpEzLYvkJCvD9hgzAn9MsVk?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
